title: Luxurious Fatty Australian Lamb Fried Rice
description: A festive and shaggy Australian dish featuring garlic granules and fatty lamb, this recipe is perfect for a special occasion, and is also sugar-free-friendly.
instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the diced onion and cook until translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the lamb shoulder and cook until browned, breaking it up into small pieces as it cooks.
Add the garlic granules, soy sauce, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Add the cooked rice to the skillet or wok, breaking up any clumps with a spatula.
Stir-fry the rice mixture for about 5 minutes, until everything is well combined and heated through.
Add the frozen peas to the skillet or wok and stir-fry for another 2 minutes.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Serve the Luxurious Fatty Australian Lamb Fried Rice hot, garnished with chopped scallions if desired.
